header.title: Confirm Your Booking
header.description: You're just one step away. Please provide your details to finalize your reservation.

guest_details_form.title: Guest Details
guest_details_form.description: This information will be used to create your booking.
guest_details_form.notes_placeholder: Let us know if you have any special requirements...

validation.full_name: Full name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.

toasts.empty_booking_description: Please select a room before proceeding.
toasts.session_not_found_description: Your booking session has expired or is invalid. Please start over.
toasts.success_description: Your reservation has been successfully created. A confirmation email is on its way.
toasts.booking_failed_description: We were unable to complete your booking at this time. Please try again.

success_page.title: Thank You For Your Booking!
success_page.confirmation_message: Your reservation has been successfully processed and a confirmation email has been sent to your address.
success_page.follow_up_message: If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.
